Meta.title: prova — hiring with the lights on
Meta.description: Task-first hiring: show your skill on a short neutral test and see every stage of the path to an offer. No résumé gate, no waiting in the dark.

Landing.heroSub: Show your skill on a short neutral test — no résumé gate, no cover letters, no waiting in the dark. You see every stage of the path to an offer. Scroll — we'll build the lamp.
Landing.ch1Body: No résumé gate, no cover letters. A short neutral task — standardized by prova, never a slice of real client work — is the whole application. Honest time estimate on every brief.
Landing.ch2Title: The lead measures the work, not the name.
Landing.ch2Body: Your test opens before your profile — reviewed like a drawing, to the millimetre. The status flips to “in review” the moment they look. You see it live.
Landing.ch3Body: The studio says “interested”, with a note from the lead. You decide to continue. Applying incognito? Your identity opens only to this studio, only when you say so.
Landing.ch4Body: Contacts exchanged — calls, interviews, the offer happen directly with the studio. We step back, but every stage stays tracked until there's an answer.
Landing.ch5Body: An offer — or an honest “no” with a reason. Never silence: studios' response times are public, and unanswered applications hit their stats, not your nerves.
Landing.demoLabel: This is what a role looks like
Landing.demoTitle: The whole path, priced and timed — before you commit a minute
Landing.cardStudioMeta: Interior design · Berlin · replies in ~3 days
Landing.d1Sub: Zoning concept, 32 m² studio · not a real project
Landing.d2Sub: Artem, senior designer — sees your work first
Landing.d4Sub: Interview & offer, straight with the studio
Landing.cardPolicy: Standardized by prova — a neutral skill check with an honest time estimate, never unpaid client work.
Landing.wlTitle: Want to interview with the lights on?
Landing.wlStudioLine: Running a studio? The pilot is onboarding now — every candidate in your queue has already done the work. Pick “I'm hiring” above.
Landing.footerTagline: Show your skills, not your résumé.

Waitlist.success: Done — you're on the list. We'll write when the lights come on.
